T0404.title: 55 Payday Loan
T0404.definition: An illegal online loan product with an extremely short term and exorbitant interest rate.
T0404.description: For example, borrowing 1,000 yuan and repaying 1,500 yuan after just five days, representing a 50% interest charge. Operated by unlicensed online lending platforms, these products prey on borrowers who have no other options, rapidly piling on penalty interest and collection pressure after default, which easily pushes borrowers into a debt spiral.
